Utility:
/* VAR-any */ /*INSERT INTO Utility*/
SELECT EVAL( '0.5 * (-4.5 * (AppActCardinality * RT_AVG/AppCardinality/100)^2 + 4.5 * (AppActCardinality * RT_AVG/AppCardinality/100)) + 0.5 * ((AppActCardinality/AppActPrice)/(AppCardinality*AppPrice))', 'RT_AVG', RT_AVGContext ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM RT_AVGContext AS RT_AVGContext

RT_AVGContext:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO RT_AVGContext*/
SELECT * FROM AverageResponseTime_Sensor OUTPUT LAST EVERY 5 SECONDS
